title: Recruitment for a Veterinary Advisor: Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) Surveillance & Evidence
body: "We have a vacancy for a Veterinary Advisor: Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) Surveillance & Evidence.  Job Title  Veterinary Advisor: Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) Surveillance & Evidence  Grade  SSO  Salary & Pension  £46,060 per annum with Pension Scheme  Annual Leave entitlement  Commencing at 25 days  Role  The Veterinary Medicines Directorate (VMD) leads governmental decision-making for AMR in animals in England. We have a dedicated AMR Surveillance & Evidence team to ensure we understand, detect, and respond to AMR risks effectively, and make evidence-based policy decisions.  This exciting new role will bring additional veterinary and epidemiological expertise to this team, as we deliver on Defra’s commitments in the UK National Action Plan.  How to apply  You must make your application via Veterinary Advisor: Antimicrobial Resistance (AMR) Surveillance & Evidence - Civil Service Jobs - GOV.UK where you will find a full job description.  Closing Date  16 October 2025 "
